Event: Auction 2025
Event Date: 27/01/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E18
Shock Freeze Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit deals 32900 / 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 magic damage to 2 random enemies and casts stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 10% / 15% / 20% / 25% / 30% / 35% / 40% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
13000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals 37900 / 54100 / 77300 / 110400 / 147200 / 184000 / 230000 magic damage to 3 random enemies and freezes them for 3 sec. During this time, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
27000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals 43600 / 62300 / 89000 / 127000 / 169600 / 212000 / 265000 magic damage to 4 random enemies and casts deep freeze on them for 3 sec. During this time, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of their abilities (except those granted by the set equipped) is increased by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the targets of the ability explode and take 24700 / 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them and into 4 nearby enemies. On hit, icicles deal 32900 / 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 magic damage, increase the cooldown time of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 10% / 15% / 20% / 25% / 30% / 35% / 40% for 3 sec.
